event: View of Palace Square and the General Headquarters Building in St. Petersburg
description: A wide panoramic view of a grand city square flanked by long neoclassical buildings. At the center stands a tall column topped with a figure (the Alexander Column). Rows of soldiers in formation line the square while crowds of civilians in colorful dress watch from the foreground. A large triumphal arch is visible in the background building. The sky is pale blue with soft clouds. The scene depicts a formal military gathering or parade in an imperial setting.

_meta.title: View of Palace Square and the General Headquarters Building in St. Petersburg
